programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Fatal Affairs
programme.desc: (M) When a young woman meets a marine, they plan to start a life together. This facade hides a double life of drugs and deceit. When the lies are exposed, the fallout is deadly.
